.input2_component:focus-within .eq-icon-left,
.input2_component:focus-within .input-icon,
.form-block:focus-within .form-icon-left,
.form-block:focus-within .form-icon-right,
.form-block:focus-within .input-icon {
  color: var(--color-border-active);
}

/* ===== Select ===== */
.select_input {
  color: var(--color-text);
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
}

.select_input option {
  color: var(--color-text);
  background-color: var(--color-bg);
}

.select_input:disabled {
  background-color: var(--color-bg-disabled);
  color: var(--color-text-disabled);
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 1;
}

.form-block {
  position: relative;
}

.form-block .form-icon-left,
.form-block .form-icon-right,
.form-block .input-icon {
  pointer-events: none;
}

.form-block:has(.select_input:disabled) .form-icon-left,
.form-block:has(.select_input:disabled) .form-icon-right,
.form-block:has(.select_input:disabled) .input-icon {
  color: var(--color-icon-disabled);
}

/* ===== Radio & Checkbox Shared ===== */
.radio_field,
.checkbox2_field {
  --bg: var(--color-bg);
  --border: var(--color-border);
  --text: var(--color-label);
  --icon: var(--color-icon);
  cursor: pointer;
  background-color: var(--bg);
  border-color: var(--border);
}

.radio_field:not(:has(input:checked)):hover,
.checkbox2_field:not(:has(.w--redirected-checked)):hover {
  --bg: var(--color-bg-hover);
}

.radio_field:has(input:checked),
.checkbox2_field:has(.w--redirected-checked) {
  --bg: var(--color-bg-active);
  --border: var(--color-border-active);
  --text: var(--color-label-active);
  --icon: var(--color-icon-active);
}

.radio_field:has(input:checked):hover,
.checkbox2_field:has(.w--redirected-checked):hover {
  --bg: var(--color-bg-active-hover);
}

.radio_field .radio_label,
.checkbox2_field .checkbox2_label {
  color: var(--text);
  transition: color var(--ts);
}

.radio_field .input-icon,
.radio_field .radio_field-icon,
.checkbox2_field .input-icon,
.checkbox2_field .checkbox2_field-icon {
  color: var(--icon);
  transition: color var(--ts);
}

.radio_field .radio2_icon,
.checkbox2_field .checkbox2_button {
  display: none;
}

/* ===== Checkbox Specific ===== */
.checkbox2_field {
  --is-checked: 0;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.checkbox2_field:has(.w--redirected-checked) {
  --is-checked: 1;
}

.checkbox2_field .input-icon,
.checkbox2_field .checkbox2_field-icon {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
}

.checkbox2_field .checkbox-icon {
  grid-area: 1 / 1;
  transition: opacity var(--ts);
}

.checkbox2_field .checkbox-icon path {
  fill: var(--icon);
  stroke: var(--icon);
  transition: fill var(--ts), stroke var(--ts);
}

.checkbox2_field .checkbox-icon.plus {
  opacity: calc(1 - var(--is-checked));
}

.checkbox2_field .checkbox-icon.check {
  opacity: var(--is-checked);
}

.checkbox2_field .checkbox-icon rect {
  stroke: var(--color-border);
  transition: fill var(--ts), stroke var(--ts);
}

.checkbox2_field .checkbox-icon.check rect {
  fill: var(--color-bg-active);
  stroke: var(--color-bg-active);
}

.checkbox2_field .checkbox-icon.check path {
  stroke: var(--color-text-active);
}
</style>

<style>
/* ===== intl-tel-input v25 ===== */

.iti {
  --iti-path-flags-1x: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intl-tel-input@25.3.1/build/img/flags.webp");
  --iti-path-flags-2x: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intl-tel-input@25.3.1/build/img/flags@2x.webp");
  --iti-path-globe-1x: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intl-tel-input@25.3.1/build/img/globe.webp");
  --iti-path-globe-2x: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intl-tel-input@25.3.1/build/img/globe@2x.webp");
  width: 100%;
}

/* Remove grey hover on selected flag area */
.iti__selected-flag,
.iti__selected-country,
.iti__selected-country-primary {
  background: transparent !important;
  border: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
}

.iti__selected-flag:hover,
.iti__selected-country:hover,
.iti__selected-country-primary:hover {
  background: transparent !important;
}

.iti__selected-flag:focus,
.iti__selected-country:focus,
.iti__selected-country-primary:focus {
  outline: none !important;
}

.iti__selected-dial-code {
  color: var(--color-text);
  font-size: 14px;
}

.iti__arrow {
  margin-left: 4px;
  border-left: 4px solid transparent;
  border-right: 4px solid transparent;
  border-top: 5px solid var(--color-icon);
}

.iti__arrow--up {
  border-top: none;
  border-bottom: 5px solid var(--color-icon);
}

.iti:focus-within .iti__arrow {
  border-top-color: var(--color-border-active);
}

.iti--container {
  z-index: 1060;
}

.iti__dropdown-content {
  background: var(--color-bg);
  border-radius: var(--radius-input);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.iti__search-input {
  background-color: var(--color-bg) !important;
  border: none !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border) !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  color: var(--color-text);
  padding: 14px 16px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-family: inherit;
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  outline: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.iti__search-input:focus {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-active) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
}

.iti__search-input::placeholder {
  color: var(--color-icon);
}

.iti__country-list {
  max-height: 240px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 8px 0;
  list-style: none;
}

.iti__country {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;
  gap: 12px;
}

.iti__country:hover,
.iti__country--highlight {
  background-color: var(--color-bg-hover);
}

.iti__flag-box {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.iti__country-name {
  flex: 1;
  color: var(--color-text);
  font-size: 14px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.iti__dial-code {
  color: var(--color-icon);
  font-size: 14px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-left: auto;
}

.iti__divider {
  border: none;
  height: 1px;
  background-color: var(--color-border);
  margin: 8px 0;
  opacity: 0.3;
}

.iti__no-results {
  padding: 16px;
  color: var(--color-icon);
  font-size: 14px;
  text-align: center;
}

.iti__country-list::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 6px;
}

.iti__country-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: transparent;
}

.iti__country-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background-color: var(--color-border);
  border-radius: 3px;
}

.iti__country-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background-color: var(--color-text);
}
</style>

<style>
/* ===== VALIDATION STATES ===== */

.form_input.is-invalid,
.select_input.is-invalid {
  border-color: #ef4444 !important;
  background-color: #fef2f2 !important;
}

.form_input.is-valid,
.select_input.is-valid {
  border-color: var(--color-border-active) !important;
}

.form_goal-wrapper.is-invalid {
  outline: 2px solid #ef4444;
  outline-offset: 8px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-input);
  animation: shake 0.4s ease-in-out;
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .form_goal-wrapper.is-invalid {
    outline-width: 1.5px;
    outline-offset: 4px;
  }
}

.form_goal-wrapper.is-valid {
  outline: none;
}

#enquiry-goal_others-textbox.is-invalid {
  border-color: #ef4444 !important;
  background-color: #fef2f2 !important;
}

#enquiry-goal_others-textbox.is-valid {
  border-color: var(--color-border-active) !important;
}

@keyframes shake {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
  20% { transform: translateX(-6px); }
  40% { transform: translateX(6px); }
  60% { transform: translateX(-4px); }
  80% { transform: translateX(4px); }
}

.w-form-fail {
  background-color: #fef2f2 !important;
  border: 1px solid #ef4444 !important;
  border-radius: var(--radius-input) !important;
  padding: 16px !important;
  margin-top: 16px !important;
  color: #dc2626 !important;
}

.input2_component:has(.is-invalid) .eq-icon-left,
.input2_component:has(.is-invalid) .input-icon,
.form-block:has(.is-invalid) .form-icon-left,
.form-block:has(.is-invalid) .form-icon-right,
.form-block:has(.is-invalid) .input-icon {
  color: #ef4444 !important;
}

.input2_component:has(.is-valid) .eq-icon-left,
.input2_component:has(.is-valid) .input-icon,

  background-color: #fef2f2 !important;
}

.iti:has(.is-valid) input.form_input {
  border-color: var(--color-border-active) !important;
}

.button[disabled] {
  opacity: 0.7 !important;
  cursor: not-allowed !important;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.form_input:focus,
.select_input:focus {
  outline: 2px solid var(--color-border-active);
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

.form_input.is-invalid:focus,
.select_input.is-invalid:focus {
  outline-color: #ef4444;
}

.form_goal-wrapper.is-invalid .radio_field,
.form_goal-wrapper.is-invalid .checkbox2_field {
  border-color: #ef4444 !important;
}

.form_input,
.select_input,
.radio_field,
.checkbox2_field,
#enquiry-goal_others-textbox {
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, outline 0.2s ease;
}

/* Character counter for Other goal */
.char-counter {
  font-size: 12px;

}
